title: IEA: oil inventories falling at record pace — 4M bbl/day in Mar-Apr, market 'severely undersupplied' until October
snippet: IEA May report warns global oil inventories declined at record pace of 4M bbl/day in March-April. Global stockpiles fell 129M barrels in March and 117M in April. OECD on-land inventories dropped 146M barrels. Market will remain 'severely undersupplied' until October even if conflict ends next month. Oil prices could rise further over summer.
tag_reason: IEA May report released 5/13, not previously covered
